title: Essence of Minecraft
description: A curated set of mods that enhance Minecraft's gameplay while preserving its vanilla feel, improving UI, sounds, quality of life, exploration, and more.
body:
A curated set of mods designed to improve all areas of Minecraft gameplay, while maintaining the core vanilla experience.         

For improving the user interface, we include features like compact fonts, smoother item animations, enhanced sounds, detailed item information, improved book visuals, and other UI enhancements.           

For quality-of-life improvements, we’ve added enhanced anvils, magic tweaks, and improved Shulker box functionality. Additional features include easier leaf clearing, a bridging aid, and alternatives to mending.


Mods that require a link in description:

https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/falling-leaves-fabric

https://vanillatweaks.net


WARNING
If you have low-end hardware, turn off shaders.
